name: Escape Police for Brainrots
description: Run from the police, collect Brainrots, and gradually improve your speed. Run across the map, avoid obstacles, and don’t get caught by the police. The farther you run, the higher your progress becomes and the better your Brainrots get. Unlock new possibilities, expand your Brainrot base, and try to run as far as possible!
instructions: Run from the police to survive zwj Collect Brainrots mdash the farther you run the better your Brainrots become Upgrade your speed to run even faster
